Defense

AC 11, touch 10, flat-footed 11 (+1 natural) HP 5 [8] (1d6+2) MP 4

Fort +2, Reflex +0, Will +4

Defensive Abilities Feathers of Gale;

Resist Water 5

Offense

Speed 20 ft., Swim 30 ft.

Melee Mace +1 (1d6+1)

Ranged Water Power Staff +0 (1d6+1 water dmg) Spells Known (White Mage CL 1st, Concentration +4) At will (DC 13) – dancing lights, daze, holy orb, message 1st (DC 14) – blind, charm, cure, dia, deprotect, deshell, fearna, heal, light, mage armor, protect, shell

Statistics

Str 12, Dex 10, Con 14, Int 10, Wis 16, Cha 12

Base Atk +0; CMB +1; CMD 11

Feats Combat Casting

Skills Heal +7, Spellcraft +5

Languages Common, Quadav SQ Hold Breath, Spell Proficiency, Steel Shelled, White Magery (Increased Healing +1) Gear cure potion(1), mace, water power staff

Special quality listed in the source statblock: Spell Proficiency.

contextNotes.text: Spellcasting proficiency/quality from the source statblock; use the actor's configured spellbook and listed spells.

description.value: Special quality listed in the source statblock: White Magery (Increased Healing +1).

contextNotes.text: Apply the source statblock's listed White Magery healing benefit to matching white magic spells.

description.value: Defensive ability listed in the source statblock: Feathers of Gale.

contextNotes.text: Defensive ability listed by the source statblock. Use the hydrated compendium item if available; otherwise resolve from source rules during play.

description.value: As a full round action, quadav may retract their body into their shell. This allows them to gain DR/5 Bludgeoning. It also allows for 20% concealment. When they use this ability, they immediately fall prone, drop anything they were holding, and any item that isn’t directly attached to their skin. While they are in this form, they cannot make attacks, use items, or cast spells. They must remain in this form for at least one complete round. To come out of their shell, they must spend another full round action (this does not provoke AoO).

contextNotes.text: Full-round action to withdraw into shell; must remain withdrawn for at least 1 complete round.
While withdrawn: DR 5/bludgeoning, 20% concealment, prone, drops held/unattached items, cannot attack, use items, or cast spells.
Full-round action to leave the shell; leaving does not provoke attacks of opportunity.
Full-round action to withdraw into shell; must remain withdrawn for at least 1 complete round.
While withdrawn: DR 5/bludgeoning, 20% concealment, prone, drops held/unattached items, cannot attack, use items, or cast spells.
Full-round action to leave the shell; leaving does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

description.value: Quadav can hold their breath underwater for a number of rounds equal to four times their Constitution score before risking drowning or suffocating.

contextNotes.text: Can hold breath as described in the ability text.
Can hold breath as described in the ability text.

description.value: As a quadav gets older the harder its shell gets and gains a +1 natural armor bonus.

contextNotes.text: Natural armor bonus is included in the source AC; do not apply a second stacking bonus unless recalculating AC from scratch.
Natural armor bonus is included in the source AC; do not apply a second stacking bonus unless recalculating AC from scratch.

description.value: As a full round action, quadav may retract their body into their shell. This allows them to gain DR/5 Bludgeoning. It also allows for 20% concealment. When they use this ability, they immediately fall prone, drop anything they were holding, and any item that isn’t directly attached to their skin. While they are in this form, they cannot make attacks, use items, or cast spells. They must remain in this form for at least one complete round. To come out of their shell, they must spend another full round action (this does not provoke AoO).

contextNotes.text: Prone; cannot attack, use items, or cast spells. Full-round action to enter or leave.
